name: Beast Master
description: Beast Masters fight as one with a loyal primal companion.

3.name: Ranger's Companion
3.description: You gain a beast companion that acts with you in combat.

7.name: Exceptional Training
7.description: Your companion gains improved command options and proficiency scaling.

11.name: Bestial Fury
11.description: Your companion can make two attacks when commanded.

15.name: Share Spells
15.description: Spells you cast on yourself can also affect your companion.
